title: CD-I The Final Destination
description:
Filler video for Halloween, this one took more time to make for few reason.

This is a random video so don't take it to seriously. =P

"Ganon voice" EVERYONE MUST DIE!!

Also, no i didn't got the idea of making this video after watching one of The Final Destination movies, i only thought it was the perfect name for this video.

"""""""""""""""""""""""""""
Song: In the Hall of the Mountain King
"""""""""""""""""""""""""""

Know the game MyBrute? It can be a fun little game where you make a character and have him fight in a arena VS other people character it is free and very simple to play with.

I'm looking for pupils! Yes, if you are interested in becoming my pupils on Mybrute well just go on this link make a character and start to fight in the arena. ^^

Here the link

http://dontmoveanddiiie.mybrute.com
